metadata.name: ragmetrics-pkg
metadata.summary: A package for integrating RagMetrics with LLM calls

functions.name: ragmetrics.api.login
documentation: Log into RagMetrics using the provided access token.

functions.name: ragmetrics.api.monitor
documentation: Start monitoring LLM calls from the provided client.

methods.name: ragmetrics.api.RagMetricsClient.login
documentation:
Log into RagMetrics using the provided access token.
This function checks if the token exists in the Token table.

methods.name: ragmetrics.api.RagMetricsClient.fetch_api_key
documentation: Fetch the OpenAI API key from the Django backend.

methods.name: ragmetrics.api.RagMetricsClient.monitor
documentation:
Patch the OpenAI client to automatically log chat completions.
This method assumes the user may provide their own OpenAI client with an API key.

methods.name: ragmetrics.api.RagMetricsClient.log_trace
documentation:
Monitor LLM calls from the provided client and log them in the traces table.
The actual response is fetched from the traces API.

methods.name: ragmetrics.api.RagMetricsClient._make_request
documentation: Helper method to make API requests to the RagMetrics server.
